summary: Completed full testing of Scheduled Blog Post Publishing feature. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - 5 stats cards (Published, Drafts, Scheduled, AI Generated, Avg SEO Score), Status dropdown with Scheduled option and CalendarClock icon, datetime picker appears when Scheduled is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: Background scheduler implementation is solid with 60-second check interval
Blog posts API correctly returns scheduled count in stats
scheduled_at field stored as ISO timestamp in MongoDB
Status dropdown includes CalendarClock icon for Scheduled option
seed_data_creation: Test created scheduled blog posts via API during testing (auto-cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled Blog Post Publishing feature is fully implemented. Navigate to: Online Store > SEO Blog tab. The 5 stats cards show Published, Drafts, Scheduled, AI Generated, and Avg SEO Score counts. When creating a post, selecting 'Scheduled' status reveals datetime picker. Background scheduler runs every 60 seconds and auto-publishes posts when scheduled_at time passes.

Backend API - GET /api/ecommerce/blog/po.details: Returns posts list with stats including scheduled count

Backend API - POST /api/ecommerce/blog/p.details: Creates post with status='scheduled' and scheduled_at datetime

Backend API - GET /api/ecommerce/blog/sc.details: Returns scheduler running status (true), check_interval (60s), upcoming posts, total_scheduled

Backend API - PUT /api/ecommerce/blog/po.details: Can update post to scheduled status with scheduled_at

Background Scheduler.details: BlogPostScheduler class runs in background, publishes_scheduled_posts() executes every 60 seconds

Frontend - Stats Cards.details: 5 cards shown: Published Posts, Drafts, Scheduled (blue), AI Generated, Avg SEO Score

Frontend - Status Dropdown.details: Shows Draft, Published, Scheduled options. Scheduled has CalendarClock icon

Frontend - Datetime Picker.details: Appears when Scheduled is selected with label 'Schedule Publication Date & Time *'

Frontend - Schedule Button Disabled.details: Publish/Unpublish button disabled for scheduled posts with title='Scheduled posts will be published automatically'

Frontend - Scheduled Badge.details: Posts with status='scheduled' show blue badge with CalendarClock icon and scheduled datetime
